mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (user_id, password, role, name, nickname, age, email, profile_img) VALUES (#{userId}, #{password}, #{role}, #{name}, #{nickname}, #{age}, #{email}, #{profileImg})
INSERT INTO refresh_token (token_hash, user_id, expires_at, revoked) VALUES (#{tokenHash}, #{userId}, #{expiresAt}, false)
INSERT IGNORE INTO revoked_access_token (jwt_id, expires_at) VALUES (#{jwtId}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM revoked_access_token WHERE jwt_id = #{jwtId} AND expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
